metaDescription: How to order HPL on tokohpl.com. A complete guide from choosing a product to confirming payment.
heading: Shopping Guide
subheading: A simple guide to ordering HPL on tokohpl.com — from choosing a product to delivery at your door.

steps.title: Find a Product
steps.desc: Browse the EDL and Lamitak catalog through the Products menu. Use the brand, collection, or size filters to narrow your search, or search directly by product code (e.g. WY 5216D).
tips: Use the collection tabs for quick filtering: Wood, Solid, Pattern, Stone
Click a product to view full specifications and the volume discount table

steps.title: Add to Cart
steps.desc: Select the number of sheets you need, then click "Add to Cart." You can add products from different brands to the same order — your cart will appear on the right side of the screen.
tips: Volume discounts are applied automatically based on total sheets
If available, you can add a matching Edge Band

steps.title: Enter a Discount Code (Optional)
steps.desc: If you have a member discount code (Bronze, Silver, Gold, or Platinum), enter it in the Coupon Code field on the cart page. We'll apply whichever gives you a bigger discount — your coupon or the volume discount.
tips: Coupon codes are personal — please don't share them with others
Discounts don't apply to Edge Band

steps.title: Enter Shipping Details
steps.desc: Click "Continue to Checkout" and fill in your details and shipping address completely and accurately. Make sure your WhatsApp number is active, since our team will contact you through it.
tips: Select your province first to see the shipping cost estimate
Use the recipient's name exactly as needed for delivery

steps.title: Confirm Your Order
steps.desc: Review all the order details on the Order Confirmation page — products, quantities, prices, and shipping address. Click "Edit Order" if anything needs changing, or "Confirm Order" once everything looks right.
tips: Orders can't be changed through the website once confirmed
For changes after confirmation, contact us via WhatsApp right away

steps.title: Make Payment
steps.desc: After confirming, you'll receive an order number and payment instructions. Transfer the exact amount shown to our BCA account within 24 hours, using your order number as the transfer reference.
tips: Transfer the exact amount — please don't round up or down
Use your order number (e.g. TPL-20250614-1234) as the transfer reference
Orders left unpaid after 24 hours are automatically cancelled

steps.title: Confirm Your Payment
steps.desc: After transferring, send payment confirmation via WhatsApp using the button on your order page. Your WhatsApp message will already be filled in with your order number and transfer amount.
tips: Our team verifies payments within 24 business hours
Keep your transfer receipt for your records

steps.title: Processing & Delivery
steps.desc: Once your payment is verified, we'll process and ship your order. Estimated delivery: 3–7 business days for Java and Bali, 7–21 business days for other regions.
tips: We'll send your tracking number via WhatsApp
Deliveries outside Jabodetabek are packed in protective wooden crates

paymentTerms: Payment is made via BCA bank transfer
Use your order number as the transfer reference
Payment deadline: 24 hours from order confirmation
Orders past the deadline are automatically cancelled
Confirm your payment via WhatsApp after transferring

faqs.q: Do I need to create an account to place an order?
faqs.a: No. TokoHPL supports guest checkout — just fill in your shipping details at checkout.
There's no minimum order in sheets — you can order starting from just 1. Volume discounts kick in starting at 10 sheets.

faqs.q: Do the listed prices include VAT?
faqs.a: Yes. All prices shown on the site already include 11% VAT, with no hidden fees.

faqs.q: Can I order products from different brands in one transaction?
faqs.a: Yes. You can order EDL and Lamitak products together in a single transaction. Volume discounts are calculated on the combined sheet total.

faqs.q: What if the product I want isn't available?
faqs.a: Contact us via WhatsApp — our team will check stock availability or suggest a suitable alternative.

faqs.q: Do you deliver nationwide across Indonesia?
faqs.a: Yes. We deliver nationwide through several trusted logistics partners. Delivery times vary depending on your destination.

faqs.q: What are the wooden crates mentioned for shipping?
faqs.a: For deliveries outside Jabodetabek, HPL products are packed in protective wooden crates to ensure they arrive in perfect condition. The crating cost is already included in the shipping fee.

faqs.q: Can I cancel or change my order?
faqs.a: Orders can be changed before confirmation, on the Order Confirmation page. After confirming, contact our team immediately via WhatsApp before payment is processed.

ctaBody: Our team is here to help.
